text:
definition USE_UNDEF_000000 := UNDEF_Q_0000 -> Q

theorem def_000000:
  assume h: Q
  conclude Q by h

definition DEF_P_Q := P -> Q

theorem def_000001 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h: DEF_P_Q
  assume hp: P
  have hq: Q by mp h hp
  conclude Q by hq

definition DEF_P_Q := P -> Q

theorem def_000002 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h: DEF_P_Q
  assume hp: P
  have hq: Q by mp h hp
  conclude Q by hq

definition USE_UNDEF_000003 := UNDEF_R_0003 -> R

theorem def_000003:
  assume h: R
  conclude R by h

definition DEF_Q_R := Q -> R

theorem def_000004 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h: DEF_Q_R
  assume hp: Q
  have hq: R by mp h hp
  conclude R by hq

definition DEF_R_Q := R -> Q

theorem def_000005 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h: DEF_R_Q
  assume hp: R
  have hq: Q by mp h hp
  conclude Q by hq

definition DEF_R_Q := R -> Q

theorem def_000006 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h: DEF_R_Q
  assume hp: R
  have hq: Q by mp h hp
  conclude Q by hq

definition USE_UNDEF_000007 := UNDEF_P_0007 -> P

theorem def_000007:
  assume h: P
  conclude P by h

theorem diag_000000 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q -> R
  have h2: R by mp h1 phantom
  conclude R by h2

theorem diag_000001 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: P -> Q
  have h2: Q by mp h1 h3
  assume h3: P
  conclude Q by h2

theorem diag_000002 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q
  conclude R by h1

theorem diag_000003 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q -> P
  assume h2: Q and R
  have h3: P by mp h1 h2
  conclude P by h3

definition UNDEF_NAME_000004 := UNDEF_REF_000004 -> R

theorem diag_000004:
  assume h: R
  conclude R by h

theorem diag_000005 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: P
  assume h2: R
  conclude P by h1

theorem diag_000006 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R -> P
  have h2: P by mp h1 phantom
  conclude P by h2

theorem diag_000007 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R -> Q
  have h2: Q by mp h1 h3
  assume h3: R
  conclude Q by h2

theorem prop_000000 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q -> R
  assume h2: Q
  have h3: R by mp h1 h2
  conclude Q -> R by h3

theorem prop_000001 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: P
  assume h2: not P
  have h3: false by neg_elim h1 h2
  conclude false by h3

theorem prop_000002 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q and R
  have h2: R by and_elim_right h1
  conclude R by h2

theorem prop_000003 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q and R
  have h2: Q by and_elim_left h1
  conclude Q by h2
